fields.helpText: This is a number representing a combination of the station number  concatenated with the inventory point for the CLRS report being stored.

This field will house the first part of the CLRS report data for the Stock on Hand report.  The data presents as follows, with  each field in brackets: <Station#>*<Date Range>*<Inventory Point ID>*<Inventory Point Name>*<Inventory Point Type>*<Total Dollars>*<# Inventory Point Items> *<Current Line Item #>*<Cost Center>

This field will house the second part of the CLRS report data for the Stock on Hand report.  The data presents as follows, with  each field in brackets: <Std Total $ Value>*<ODI  Total $ Value>*<All Total $ Value>*<Std # SOH Items>*<ODI # SOH Items>*<All # SOH Items>*<Std # Inv Items>*<ODI # Inv Items>*<All # Inv Items>

This field will house the first part of the CLRS report data for the Stock Status Report.  The data reports as follows, with each field in brackets:  <Station #>*<Date Range>*<Inactivity Range>*<Inventory Point ID>*<Inventory Point>*<Inventory Point Type>

This field will house the second part of the CLRS report data for the Stock Status Report.  The data reports as follows, with each field in brackets: <Std Opening Balance Total>*<ODI Opening Balance Total>*<All Opening Balance Total>*<Std Receipts Total>*<ODI Receipts Total>*<All Receipts Total>*<Std Usage Total>*<ODI Usage Total>*<All Usage Total>*<Std Adjustments Total>*<ODI  Adjustments Total>*<All Adjustments Total>

This field will house the third part of the CLRS report data for the Stock Status Report.  The data reports as follows, with each field in brackets: <Std Closing Balance Total>*<ODI Closing Balance Total>*<All Closing Balance Total>*<# Std Receipts>*<# ODI Receipts>*<# All  Receipts>*<# Std Usage>*<# ODI Usage>*<# All Usage>*<# Std Adjustments>*<# ODI Adjustments>*<# All Adjustments>

This field will house the fourth part of the CLRS report data for the  Stock Status Report.  The data reports as follows, with each field in brackets: <Std Turnover Total>*<ODI Turnover Total>*<All Turnover Total>*<Std # Inactive Items>*<ODI # Inactive Items>*<All # Inactive Items>*<Std Inactive Total $>*<ODI Inactive Total $>*<All Inactive Total $>*<Std Inactive %>*<ODI Inactive %>*<All Inactive %>

This field will house the fifth part of the CLRS report data for the  Stock Status Report.  The data reports as follows, with each field in brackets: <Std # Long Supply>*<ODI # Long Supply>*<All # Long Supply>*<Std Long Supply Total $>*<ODI Long Supply Total $>*<All Long Supply Total $>*<Std Long Supply %>*<ODI Long Supply %>*<All Long Supply %>*<Std # Inventory Line Items>*<ODI # Inventory Line Items>*<All # Inventory Line Items>
